summary: Users repeatedly click a pricing card header that looks interactive but does nothing.

evidence.note: 3 repeated clicks on card title region without state change.

whyItMatters: Creates friction during plan selection and increases drop-off before checkout.

summary: Primary checkout CTA is below the fold on common mobile viewport heights.

evidence.note: CTA not visible until second scroll; users hesitate and bounce.

whyItMatters: Reduces conversion by hiding the next-step action at a critical moment.
